MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
                Executive Order No. 686.
     Appointing Lieutenat Commander Duette W. Rose
     Supply Corps, U. S. Navy, Officer in charge of
      Department of State of Finance and Commerce.
                      0. G. No. 3278.

    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
    1.- Lieutenant Commander Duette W. Rose, Supply Corps,
U. S. Navy, is from t h e date of this Executive Order, aplmin’ced
Officer in charge of the Department of State of Finance and
Commerce, in the place of L i e c t c n m t Commander A r t h u r H.
Mayo, Supply Corps, U. S. Kavy.
